extensionDescription.message: Sixitaan xirfad leh oo Carabi ah oo loogu talagalay website kasta. Waxay hagaajisaa kala fogaanshaha xarfaha, waxay gelisaa farsamooyinka Carabiga ee quruxda badan, waxayna saxdaa arrimaha soo bandhigida ee keena in qoraalka Carabigu kala go'o.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Kadee ama dami kordhinta Arabic Type

letterSpacingNote.message: Kala fogaanshaha xarfaha had iyo jeer waxaa loo dejiyaa 0 si looga hortago kala go'ida xarfaha Carabiga. Tani waa sababta ugu caansan ee soo bandhigida Carabiga ee jaban webka.

forceRTLDescription.message: Waxay ku qasabtaa jihada midig-ilaa-bidix ee baloogyada qoraalka Carabiga. U kadee goobaha uu Carabigu si khaldan uga soo baxo bidix-ilaa-midig.

diacriticsDescription.message: Waxay wanaajisaa soo bandhigidda calaamadaha shaqalka Carabiga (tashkeel) si looga hortago goynta kor iyo hoos ee xariiqda qoraalka.

siteFontOverrideLabel.message: Ku isticmaal far ka duwan goobtan

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: U xullo far ka duwan goobtan oo keliya, adigoo ka gudbaya xulashadaada farta caalamiga ah.

fontSourceNote.message: Farsamooyinka waxaa bixiya Google Fonts. Waxay u baahan tahay xiriir internet ah si loo soo raro marka hore.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Codsadka farta waxaa loo diraa sirfaha Google. Eeg fonts.google.com/privacy.

statusArabicDetected.message: Qoraalka Carabiga waa la helay — $COUNT$ qaybood ayaa la hagaajiyay.

statusGlobalMode.message: Isticmaalka qaabka caalamiga ah — sifooyinka lang/dir waa la helay.

statusNoArabic.message: Ma jiro qoraal Carabi oo laga helay boggan.
